mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sector_context_snapshot ( trade_date, sector, sector_breadth_1430, sector_return_1430, sector_avg_tail_momentum, sector_rank, sector_score, valid_stock_count, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{item.tradeDate}, #{item.sector}, #{item.sectorBreadth1430}, #{item.sectorReturn1430}, #{item.sectorAvgTailMomentum}, #{item.sectorRank}, #{item.sectorScore}, #{item.validStockCount}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE sector_breadth_1430 = VALUES(sector_breadth_1430), sector_return_1430 = VALUES(sector_return_1430), sector_avg_tail_momentum = VALUES(sector_avg_tail_momentum), sector_rank = VALUES(sector_rank), sector_score = VALUES(sector_score), valid_stock_count = VALUES(valid_stock_count), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
